component.name: PyQRDataExchange
component.summary: Transfer files via encrypted QR codes

description.p: PyQRDataExchange bundles one or more files into a tar archive, compresses it with LZMA, encrypts it with a password, and encodes the result as one or more QR codes for air-gapped, screen-to-camera data transfer. It can also read those QR codes back and restore the original files.
